title: Lachiysh #3923
definition:
Lachish = "invincible"

 1) a city lying south of Jerusalem on the borders of Simeon and which
    belonged to the Amorites until conquered by Joshua and allotted to
    Judah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Lachish = "invincible"

 1) a city lying south of Jerusalem on the borders of Simeon and which
    belonged to the Amorites until conquered by Joshua and allotted to
    Judah

    NASB:  a Canaanite city S.W. of Jer.
